'''Ral Shawgrim''' was a turn-coat [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] technician, who was wanted by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for treason, espionage, and theft of Alliance and New Republic material. The New Republic had issued a bounty of 35,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on his head, and he was also hunted by the [[Imperial Remnant]].

==Biography==
Shawgrim was born aboard the [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Panorama]]'', near the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]]. His family was eventually slaughtered by Imperial troops. In response to this tragedy, he contacted a Rebel recruiter on [[Zalso|Zelso]] and joined the cause of the Rebellion where his parents used to work.<ref name="AJ1" />

===Hero of the Rebellion===
Shawgrim proved to be an adept starship technician and quickly rose to the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]. He served for two years on Zelso, and was hospitalized twice during the [[Jendar Campaign]] at [[Jendar]]. He was awarded the [[Usor Cluster]] for his valor, and was officially a hero of the Rebellion.<ref name="AJ1" />

Shortly after the conclusion of the Jendar Campaign, he was transferred to the [[Mon Calamari Orbital Shipyards]] at [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], where he served as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] repair coordinator.<ref name="AJ1" />

===Treason===
While working at the Calamari Shipyards, Shawgrim managed to duplicate the plans on the [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] [[T-65B X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65B X-wing starfighter]]. With near-complete plans of the starfighter in his possession, he attempted to leave Mon Calamari and make contact with the Imperially aligned [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]] and hand them the plans, which would have been a disaster for the Rebellion.<ref name="AJ1" />

Fortunately for the Rebels, an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] with the designation [[R2-X9]] alarmed security, when it noticed Shawgrim blasting out of [[Docking Facility 7K]] in an unauthorized space shuttle. A group of Rebel operatives, led by [[Palpatine Essex Yerac|Essex Yerac]], managed to retrieve the plans, although Shawgrim escaped.<ref name="AJ1" />

===On the run===
The Alliance, and later the New Republic, issued a bounty on his head. Due to his failure to deliver the plans, [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Brinkan]] of the Empire, and later the [[Imperial Remnant]], also issued a bounty on him. He was hunted by no less the three [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] for nearly four years.<ref name="AJ1" />

To conceal his true identity, Shawgrim typically wore civilian clothing, though his old Rebel tech suit remained in his possession, and he would also sport hats to conceal his hair color.<ref name="AJ1" />
